# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://example.com
        - https://anotherdomain.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      headers:
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Accept
      max_age: 3600
      credentials: true
    apply_at: global

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
      key_in_body: false
      hide_credentials: true
    apply_at: service
    service: example_service

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 5
      minute: 100
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      redis_timeout: 2000
    apply_at: route
    route: example_route
